title: Create augmentation.py — data augmentation and retraining
acceptance_criteria: Accepts windowed time-series data from windowing.py
Implements at least 4 augmentation techniques: additive Gaussian noise, time-warping, amplitude scaling, and sensor dropout
Augments each window stochastically with configurable probability
Retrains XGBoost and Random Forest on augmented training set
Compares augmented vs non-augmented performance and stores results
Returns augmented training data and a comparison summary
